decompose_simple_api.input: Build a REST API for todos
response: Set up Express.js project with TypeScript configuration
Create database schema for todos table
Implement CRUD endpoints (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE)
Add input validation and error handling
Write integration tests for all endpoints
Design cache node architecture with leader election
Implement gossip protocol for cache invalidation
Add vector clocks for causality tracking
Build partition detection and healing logic
Create configurable consistency levels (strong, eventual, causal)
Add integration tests for partition scenarios

response: Add random selection algorithm with seed-based reproducibility
